titles.text: Clan of Heroes: Generals of the Yang Family

descriptions.text:
Clan of Warriors - Generals of the Yang Family is a beat'em up that is based off the story several old Chinese stories and Folklore Songs.

Choose between 4 playable warriors to defend your country from foreign military invaders.

This title was originally released exclusively in China. Piko Interactive acquired the full rights of the game to localize it to English speaking players. The game has been completely re-hauled fixing many of the original bugs and play ability problems. There is a lot of polishing done to the fighting and collision engine. Over all the game was worked up to be finally enjoyable from beginning to end.

The fate of your country rests on your shoulders!

As members of the Yang family, it is your job to push back the Lao Dynasty and Wester Xia, who have come to invade your country. Choose your hero and face their terrible army, alone or with the help of a friend. With bare hands or stabbing, every move is allowed to defeat your opponents.
